---
name: "QOL / Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an improvement or new feature for Fairline"
title: "[Suggestion] "
labels: "suggestion"
assignees: ""
---

## Summary
Describe the improvement or feature you would like to suggest.

---

## Why is this needed?
Explain what problem this would solve or what experience it would improve.

---

## Suggested solution
Describe how you think it could work.

Example:
- A new command
- A UI change
- A gameplay change
- A quality-of-life improvement

---

## Extra information
Add screenshots, examples, references, or anything else that helps explain the idea.
